translation.literal_translation: And because it is taught by figurative construction, there is no contradiction, as in the case of 'honey' and the like. (10)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.10: non-literal pedagogical designation (kalpana-upadesa) is acceptable in sruti, just as in other known figurative teachings; therefore aja-language here does not force Sankhya literalism.
translation.interpretive_note: Analogy to recognized figurative vidyas secures semantic legitimacy.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Madhu reference is kept brief and may be expanded in section commentary.
Technical line assumes acceptance of figurative teaching as valid pramana-support in context.
